name: Solana Meme Token Analyzer
tagline: Detect insider wallets and rug risk for any Solana meme token CA
description:
Instantly analyze any Solana token contract address (CA) for rug pull risk. Scans the top 20 holders, detects insider/pre-mine wallets (老鼠仓 — wallets holding large token amounts with almost no SOL), and calculates top-holder concentration to assess dump risk. Returns a clear risk level: LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH / EXTREME.

Built for Solana meme coin traders who want to quickly evaluate a token before buying. Works without any API key using public RPC nodes — or set a free Helius API key for higher reliability on popular tokens.
